videos.headline: Darion Williamson makes leaping grab for FSU TD
videos.description: Florida State QB Jordan Travis slings it to Darion Williamson in the end zone, who makes a leaping grab for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Darion Williamson makes leaping grab for FSU TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trey Benson goes right up the gut for an FSU TD
videos.description: FSU RB Trey Benson rushes up the middle on fourth down and finds the end zone on a 19-yard run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trey Benson goes right up the gut for an FSU TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU gets aggressive early as they recover onside kick in 1st quarter
videos.description: After scoring a TD, Florida State decides to go for an onside kick in the first quarter and they recover.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU gets aggressive early as they recover onside kick in 1st quarter) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trey Benson waltzes in for another FSU TD
videos.description: Florida State RB Trey Benson takes the handoff and walks into the end zone for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trey Benson waltzes in for another FSU TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU pouring it on after Jordan Travis' TD pass to Keon Coleman
videos.description: Florida State QB Jordan Travis finds Keon Coleman open in the end zone for a touchdown to extend the Seminoles' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU pouring it on after Jordan Travis' TD pass to Keon Coleman) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jarrian Jones goes untouched on pick-six for FSU
videos.description: Florida State DB Jarrian Jones comes away with an interception and returns it 30 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jarrian Jones goes untouched on pick-six for FSU) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Keon Coleman hurdles defender on big FSU play
videos.description: Florida State QB Jordan Travis tosses to Keon Coleman, who makes one defender miss and hurdles over another to get inside the 10-yard line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Keon Coleman hurdles defender on big FSU play) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Markeston Douglas bounces off a tackle for another big FSU TD
videos.description: Florida State QB Tate Rodemaker throws to Markeston Douglas, who shakes off a tackle and goes 42 yards to the house.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Markeston Douglas bounces off a tackle for another big FSU TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
